"I'm always trying to help consumers make smarter decisions about things like taking out warranties or selecting a cleaning service or other product," she says. "Email as far in advance as possible and don't send it by regular mail. Follow-up calls are OK," she advises. She recently wrote about the importance of checking out the reputations of pet boarding kennels in advance.
